body:
## PR1 — Claude Company OS (control layer)

First of 6 PRs in the Dealix launch plan. Establishes an **enforced identity and hard
rules** for Claude Code **before** any public-facing surface is touched.

### What this adds (docs-only — no website/source/pricing changes)
- **`CLAUDE.md`** — project constitution: Dealix = Saudi-first AI Business Operating System
  (not CRM/chatbot/agency/generic AI tool/only Revenue OS); the five operating questions;
  15 consolidated hard rules; the 14 OS modules + status discipline; repo map; build/verify
  commands; the 6-PR execution discipline.
- **`.claude/agents/`** — 10 launch specialists: `brand-director`,
  `visual-identity-designer`, `website-architect`, `growth-strategist`, `seo-geo-agent`,
  `conversion-specialist`, `proof-governance-reviewer`, `delivery-architect`, `qa-verifier`,
  `founder-ceo-operator`. (Existing `dealix-*` agents kept.)
- **`.claude/skills/`** — read-only governance checks: `claims-check`, `one-cta-check`,
  `module-status-check`.
- **`.claude/commands/`** — `/launch-status`, `/verify-launch`, `/new-page`.

### Scope guardrails honored
- No website files touched. No source code touched. No pricing/public pages touched.
- `.claude/` files force-added to match the precedent of the existing tracked `dealix-*` agents.

### Verification
- `git diff --stat` → 17 files, 712 insertions, all under `CLAUDE.md` + `.claude/`.

### Next (gated on founder approval)
**PR2 — Brand Foundation** (`docs/00_platform_truth/*`). No move to PR2 until this is
reviewed and approved.

🤖 Draft — for founder review. Nothing merges without approval.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01QWtBoDGpCYnaSQXqLBQguj

---
